spec_match.rationale: The DOM tree traversal model correctly demonstrates ancestor autocorrect inheritance and descendant overrides.

interactive.rationale: The page provides multiple toggle buttons across DOM levels and updates the tree diagram, IDL readout, and summary table live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept matches the feature-index promise of testing form, fieldset, div, input, and textarea inheritance.

edge_cases.rationale: The demo directly exposes parent off, child on, inherited defaults, and missing-attribute override combinations.

references.rationale: The references section now includes chromestatus.com/feature/6264645053710336 and the HTML autocorrection spec link.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared CSS variables, high-contrast state badges, and paired button background/color declarations.

accessibility.rationale: Every detected native or ARIA control now has a programmatic accessible name; toggle state is exposed where applicable.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh direct same-origin browser validation found no unnamed controls. Clipboard-only write denials in unfocused automated frames are environment restrictions, not hidden failures.

summary: Named every rendered inheritance test field and removed hidden probe controls from the accessibility tree. Accessibility recheck passed.
